title: Notifications - Low Battery
scenario: Low battery notification appears when paired Poly device is turned off and back on below 5% battery, and tapping notification redirects to Poly Lens home screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is paired and connected.
2. Verify the device battery level is below 5% (low battery state).
3. Press the Power button on the device to turn it off.
4. Send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
5. Press the Power button on the device again to turn it back on.
6. Observe the notification area on the Android device.
7. Tap the "Device has a low battery" notification when it appears.
expected: A "Device has a low battery" notification appears. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Lens application home screen.
